noteEn: One of: (1) Employment certificate for company employees; (2a) Copy of tax return + (2b) business license for self-employed; (3) Written statement and supporting evidence for other cases. Self-employed persons must substantiate their occupation (e.g., corporate registration certificate).
noteJa: 会社等勤務：在職証明書、自営業等：確定申告書控えの写し及び営業許可書の写し（ある場合）、その他：職業に係る説明書及び立証資料。両者とも無職の場合もその旨の説明書を提出。
